title: Implement closures
description: Ensure proper closure semantics — lambdas should capture their enclosing environment. SK bracket abstraction handles this correctly via the S combinator, which threads free variables through applications. Verified by integration tests (partial application, Church pairs, nested capture). A direct evaluator with explicit closures was built and then removed — SK translation is the sole evaluation path.
resolution: SK bracket abstraction preserves closure semantics. Direct evaluator removed in favor of SK-only evaluation.
